data.body:
EPIC PLAN-REVIEW r3 -> 8 BLOCKs (new deeper issues, all legit). Remediated:
- AWS KMS/Ed25519 INCOMPATIBILITY (real trap, flagged x4): KMS asymmetric SIGN_VERIFY = ECDSA/RSA only, not Ed25519. Fixed AC5 + child ee0b: Ed25519 key material in AWS Secrets Manager (KMS-CMK encrypted at rest); server signs via SSHSIG itself; NOT KMS managed signing.
- AC5 endpoint auth unspecified -> AWS IAM SigV4 restricted to named admin role over TLS.
- (commit, intra_idx) hallucinated symbol (inherited from orig epic text) -> merged-log position = main commit SHA; substrate intra-commit tiebreak is {timestamp}-{uuid}, N/A to explicit-SHA model.
- Revoked keys retained in config keyring for two-phase historical-key pass.
368c already PASSED r3 (certified attestation). Epic r4 running (b0ecvp414). Once epic PASSES, claim 368c (cascades to epic) + start held-out TDD. RED test drafts staged (verdict token fixed to 'bad-signature' hyphen matching shipped verify_authorship.py convention).
